holdings.infoBox: BOTZ is an equity ETF with a total of 66 individual holdings. The top holdings are ABB Ltd stock at 9.18%, Keyence at 9.12%, NVIDIA at 8.70%, Fanuc at 8.68%, and Intuitive Surgical at 6.29%.

overview.description: The Global X Robotics & Artificial Intelligence ETF (BOTZ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund provides market- cap selected and weighted exposure to companies involved in the development and production of robots or artificial intelligence. BOTZ was launched on Sep 12, 2016 and is issued by Global X.
infoTable: Indxx Global Robotics & Artificial Intelligence Thematic Index
